title: Novo Nordisk — Overview
html:
Novo Nordisk — Account Overview

Source: Dave Johnson FY26 AO Plan (Apr 2026 update) AO: Dave Johnson (Principal) AD: Melissa Weinstein FY25 Base: $470K FY26 Target: $400K (-16% — decline expected) FY26 YTD (3/31/26): $0

Account Status: AT RISK

Novo is the most challenged account in Dave's portfolio. Zero bookings YTD and significant structural headwinds.

What happened:

  • Novo downsized and restructured in FY1Q — all MR budgets are frozen
  • Decisions on new research being made by procurement (not insights teams)
  • Wegovy HCP-Patient research not renewed for 2026
  • Outside chance it returns for part of the year, but less likely as time passes
  • Key contact Rob Little is no longer at Novo
  • Teams stretched thin, general environment challenging — difficult even to connect with contacts

2H26 approach: Focus on procurement relationship — ZoomRx has good relationship with Jenn Ferrara in procurement. Will use thought leadership sharing to set up meetings with MR team.

Key Relationships

Current contacts:

  • Elly Simmons — took Rob Little's role
  • Kashish Goel — Wegovy
  • Paul Zimmerman
  • Kristen Coyne
  • Karlyn Walsh
  • Jenn Ferrara — Procurement (good relationship, responsive to meeting requests)

Competitive & Org Context

  • Novo has been reluctant to change vendors historically
  • With C-level restructuring, doors may open to new vendor partnerships
  • ZoomRx believes AI offerings will resonate — will pursue in FY26
  • AI status at Novo: Unknown across all dimensions

Key Brand

Brand Status Notes
Wegovy (obesity/GLP-1) Lost HCP-Patient not renewed for 2026. Now run from India with reduced buy-in.

Back to Accounts Hub | Home
